name: Scatterbrain
description: Post-it-note and cork-board workshop — a warm desk-paper field, pastel sticky-note surfaces (yellow / blue / pink), warm-charcoal ink and a thumbtack-red pop. Chunky decorative Shrikhand display + a friendly Zilla Slab slab-serif body + a Caveat hand-script label voice. Tacked sticky notes, collage tape, and doodle scribbles over a soft lifted drop shadow.
descriptionZh: 便利贴与软木板工作坊——暖桌面纸底、粉彩便利贴面（黄/蓝/粉）、暖炭墨与图钉红点缀。厚重装饰性 Shrikhand 标题 + 友好 Zilla Slab 板衬线正文 + Caveat 手写标签体。图钉便利贴、拼贴胶带、涂鸦手绘配柔和浮起投影。
bestFor: Brainstorm / creative-process / education / lighthearted topics — a warm hand-made workshop-board register.
